about_contact: Found a bug? Have a suggestion, comment, or question?
announcements_no_details: This news item has no details.
help_intro: Everything you need to know to use the application well.
help_not_route_planner: A route planner from point A to point B.
help_not_official_app: The official application for your transport network.
help_is_bus_location: A simple and quick way to see where your bus is.
help_is_network_activity: A playful tool for viewing overall network activity.
help_data_freshness_text: A position may be several minutes old if it has not been refreshed in time by the operator. The application shows the recorded timestamp sent in the vehicle details.
help_realtime_depends: Real-time data depends entirely on each network's willingness to publish it and on the technical quality of their data feeds.
help_realtime_unavailable: If real-time data is unavailable, Bus Tracker is rarely the cause. The application only displays data sent by operators.
help_new_networks_discord: Any suggestion to add a network must be made on the dedicated Discord server.
help_prioritization_text: The application is resource-intensive. Networks are added according to general interest and technical feasibility.
help_no_obligation_text: Adding a suggested network is not automatic. The final decision remains at the editor's discretion.
networks_list_description: Select a network to view its vehicles and lines.
networks_list_search_placeholder: Search for a network or city…
network_vehicles_empty: No vehicle matches these search criteria
network_vehicles_none_online: No vehicle out of {count} is in service
map_lines_no_vehicle_network: No vehicle is running on this network.
map_lines_no_vehicle_rest: No vehicle is running on the rest of the network.
map_lines_no_vehicle_these: No vehicle is running on these lines.
map_network_search_placeholder: Search for a network or city...
marker_missing_description: This entry is no longer current and should disappear on the next map refresh.
marker_air_conditioning_report_applied: Thanks, the air conditioning status has been updated.
marker_air_conditioning_report_current_b:
Air conditioning is currently reported as out of service.
Is it still the case?
marker_air_conditioning_report_current_f:
Air conditioning is reported as working.
Is it the case?
marker_air_conditioning_report_duplicate: Thanks, a recent report already exists for this vehicle.
marker_air_conditioning_report_error: The report could not be saved.
marker_air_conditioning_report_mark_brok: Non, la climatisation ne fonctionne plus
marker_air_conditioning_report_recorded: Thanks, the report has been saved.
marker_air_conditioning_report_restored: Non, la climatisation fonctionne à nouveau
marker_air_conditioning_report_still_bro: Oui, la climatisation est toujours hors service
psod_intro: Information about the error has been sent for analysis.
psod_intro_reload: In the meantime, you can try reloading the application.
psod_persistent: If the problem persists, you can also try resetting the application data.
psod_contact_before: Finally, you can contact me at
welcome_back_contact: For any other question, contact me by email
welcome_back_data: Regarding data, everything has been synchronized so that no information is lost.
welcome_back_features: All features have been carried over to this new version.
welcome_back_intro: This address ({url}) now replaces the local instance you used to use.
welcome_back_take_time: Still, take a few minutes to find your bearings.
settings_editor_token_copied: Authentication token copied to the clipboard!
settings_editor_token_invalid: No contributor exists with this token.
settings_geolocate_on_start_description: Locate me when the application opens.
settings_hide_scheduled_trips_descriptio: Hide trips for which no real-time data is available.
settings_only_networks_with_history_desc: Networks to show on the Data selection page.
settings_preview_vehicle_number_descript: Preview the vehicle number when zooming on a map point.
settings_show_debug_info_description: Show technical information about the application.
settings_show_identified_vehicles_panel_: When filtering the map by line, show the table of identified vehicles running on the line.
vehicle_action_archive_break_ref: Break the association between {vehicleRef} and this vehicle
vehicle_action_archive_description_intro: A vehicle may be archived for the following reasons:
vehicle_action_archive_description_retir: it has been retired (TC-Infos is the source of truth);
vehicle_action_archive_description_unrea: it does not match a real vehicle on the network.
vehicle_action_archive_error: An error occurred while archiving the vehicle.
vehicle_action_archive_wipe_warning_afte: the vehicle number may be reused soon on the network.
vehicle_action_edit_designation_descript: Please provide a complete vehicle designation.
vehicle_action_edit_error_line_1: An error occurred while saving the information.
vehicle_action_edit_error_line_2: Check that the token is valid and that you have editing rights.
vehicle_action_unarchive_confirm: Are you sure you want to unarchive this vehicle?
vehicle_action_unarchive_error: An error occurred while unarchiving the vehicle.
line_assignments_empty: No vehicle was observed on this line on this date.
legal_editor_text: This site is published for non-professional purposes by an individual as part of a leisure activity.
legal_editor_anonymous: In accordance with Article 6, III, 2 of French Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 (LCEN), the editor has chosen to remain anonymous. Personal contact details have been duly provided to the hosting provider.
legal_source_license: The source code is made available under the GNU General Public License v3.0. You are free to view and modify it under the terms of this license on
legal_content_identity_text: Access to the source code does not grant any rights over editorial content, the logo, or the visual identity.
legal_content_identity_warning: Direct copying of the site or its visual identity is strictly prohibited.
legal_privacy_intro: PostHog EU collects the following data for Bus Tracker to analyze usage and help resolve issues:
legal_privacy_technical_data: Anonymized technical data (browser, operating system, device type)
legal_privacy_errors: Errors raised while the application is running
legal_privacy_rights: Your rights (access, deletion) can be exercised by email at
legal_reliability_indicative: Although the data is considered reliable for most networks, it is provided for information purposes only.
legal_reliability_proof: Bus Tracker cannot under any circumstances be used as "legal" or official evidence (including before an employer or any other authority). The accuracy of positions and schedules is not guaranteed and depends on the data feeds provided by operators.
vehicle_no_activity: This vehicle has not been observed in commercial service yet.
